# Round Table London West End No. 623

> Round Table London West End No. 623 (also known as LWE 623 or RT LWE 623) is a fellowship
> and social club for men aged 18–45 based in central London, UK. The club is a member of
> Round Tables of Great Britain and Ireland (RTBI) and runs a full calendar of social events,
> community service projects, and international fellowship activities throughout the London
> West End area.

## Key Facts

- **Full name:** Round Table London West End No. 623
- **Short names:** LWE 623, RT LWE 623, London West End Tablers, The Westenders
- **Type:** Fellowship and social club (men 18–45), voluntary sector
- **Parent organisation:** Round Tables of Great Britain and Ireland (RTBI)
- **Area:** London West End (Soho and surrounding areas)
- **Re-chartered:** 2019
- **Programme year:** April to April (current: April 2026 – April 2027)
- **Website:** https://lwe623.uk
- **Email:** london.westend@roundtable.org.uk

## About Round Table London West End 623

Round Table London West End No. 623 was re-chartered in 2019 and is based in central London,
meeting at venues across Soho and the broader West End. The club runs monthly business
meetings alongside a packed social programme, with events ranging from themed social nights
and arcade sessions to charity fundraisers and national/international Round Table gatherings.

Membership is open to men aged 18–45. The club encourages meaningful friendship, personal
growth, and community impact — the three pillars of Round Table worldwide.

## Current Members (2026–27)

- **Jon Clark** — Founding member; National President of RTBI (2025–26)
- **John Bergqvist** — Immediate Past Chairman (2025–26); scientist and outdoorsman
- **Amrinder Chana** — Area 6 Chairman (2026–27); 14+ years in Table leadership
- **Vedang Tyagi** — Chairman; doctor and global fellowship ambassador
- **Ryan Zammit** — Logistics lead; motorsport and travel enthusiast
- **Matteo** — Veteran Tabler; community fundraising and social energy
- **Amit Shah** — Software engineer; global explorer and craft-beer scout
- **Steve** — Foundation member since re-charter
- **Kyle "Mitchi" West** — Workshop wizard; DnD and comics enthusiast
- **David Crow** — International social operator and nightlife presence
- **Jay Shah** — Multi-region leader; entrepreneur and endurance adventurer

## Programme 2026–2027 (selected events)

- April 2026: AGM — RT Pub, Soho
- April 2026: Disko Wunderbar social night — Albert Schloss, Soho
- May 2026: Business Meeting — RT Pub, London West End
- May 2026: NQ64 Arcade Night — NQ64 Arcade, Soho
- Full calendar available at https://lwe623.uk/#programme

## Contact & Social Media

- **Website:** https://lwe623.uk
- **Email:** london.westend@roundtable.org.uk
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/rtlondonwestend
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/share/1DAJHdvB5D/

## Visiting Tablers

National and international Tablers who meet the Westenders are invited to sign the
digital Visiting Book at https://lwe623.uk/#visiting-book

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Round Table?**
Round Table is a fellowship movement for men aged 18–45. It was founded in 1927 in the UK
and now operates in over 60 countries. RTBI (Round Tables of Great Britain and Ireland) is
the national body.

**Who can join?**
Any man aged 18–45 can join. Contact london.westend@roundtable.org.uk to express interest.

**Where do you meet?**
Venues across London's West End, mainly Soho. Details shared per event via WhatsApp and Spond.

**Can visiting Tablers come to socials?**
Yes — visiting Tablers from any club (UK or international) are always welcome. Message us ahead
of time at london.westend@roundtable.org.uk.
